name: Playtest 3: Wizard's Duel
description:
TESTS: Saving throws (DEX, WIS), condition application (paralyzed from Hold Person), concentration checks on damage, advantage/disadvantage from conditions, spell resource costs (spell slots), cantrip vs leveled spell usage, AI spellcaster behavior.

Elara faces an enemy mage in an arcane duel. The mage has Hold Person (paralyzed + concentration) and Fireball to stress-test save mechanics.
